title: Croatian Meat Wrap
description: A delicious and crunchy wrap filled with tender Croatian meat, perfect for a quick snack or meal.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Grill the Croatian sausage for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, slice the meat wrap in half lengthwise and toast on the grill or in a toaster.
Shred the lettuce and chop the caramelized onions.
Assemble the wrap by placing the grilled sausage on the bottom half, followed by the shredded lettuce, chopped onions, crushed red pepper, salt, and pepper.
Top with crumbled feta cheese, if desired.
